snippet: Dear Ms. Worms, I would like to inform you that the funds from the Vlaams Woningfonds have now been received in the blocked account. If our meeting on Friday morning remains convenient for you, that
subject: Confirmation of Funds Received and Meeting Availability
body:
Dear Ms. Worms,

I would like to inform you that the funds from the Vlaams Woningfonds have
now been received in the blocked account.

If our meeting on Friday morning remains convenient for you, that would be
perfectly fine for me. However, I would also like to mention that I am free
this Thursday and could come at any time during the day if that is more
suitable for you.

Please let me know what works best.

Kind regards,
Denys Maiorov
